title: Mystery rituals of the ancient world. #mystery #history #aliens
summary: This short clip discusses the theory that Christ's Last Supper may have been influenced by pagan mystery rituals, referencing Martin Luther King's essay on the influence of mystery religions on Christianity and scholar Dennis McDonald's comparison of the Last Supper to Dionysian cult imagery.

key_claims.claim: Martin Luther King wrote an essay called 'The Influence of Mystery Religions on Christianity' positing the Pagan continuity hypothesis
Christianity bears a striking resemblance to pagan polytheistic traditions and rituals that occurred across the ancient world
The eating of flesh and drinking of blood in the Last Supper points to Dionysian cult imagery and the immortality initiates gain by such activity
